source: In the living room I close the curtains and then I take a break.
Early in the morning I refill the kettle so I do not forget.
On the porch I bring in the groceries before the kitchen gets busy.
At the counter I put the book back with a steady pace.
On the porch I put the book back before it gets late.
In the afternoon I clean the table and then I relax.
In the hallway I clean the table so I can focus later.
On my break I charge my phone before it gets late.
